title: TC4 focus projectile visual/sound/particle parity batch
implemented: Replaced Stage174 no-op projectile renderer with original TC4 texture-sheet based translucent quad renderer
FrostShard uses original frostshard texture and damage-scaled shard visual adapter
ExplosiveOrb uses original particles2 sheet frame coordinates and original 1.0 base strength
ShockOrb uses original particles sheet frame sequence, area 4 and damage 5 defaults
PrimalOrb uses original particles sheet frame sequence, primal aspect colors and 5000 tick lifetime
Client tick particles and original TC4 sound keys for FrostShard, ExplosiveOrb, ShockOrb and PrimalOrb where the original projectiles used these effects
Removed non-original FrostShard snow placement drift from Stage174
adapters: Original RenderFrostShard OBJ/GL11 path is represented with the original frostshard texture on a Forge 1.19.2 entity quad until a baked OBJ adapter is added
Original RenderPrimalOrb GL triangle rays are represented with rotating particle-sheet quads using the same primal colors and frame source
deferred: Baked OBJ model adapter for original textures/models/orb.obj
Exact ParticleEngine FX classes for wisp/fire/shock beyond vanilla particle equivalents
Exact primal orb side effects for nodes/taint once aura/nodes final parity is complete
